top_items.title: Imaginative Perception Tokens Enhance Spatial Reasoning in Multimodal Language Models

definition: Spatial reasoning is the capability of an AI system to interpret, represent, and infer relationships about the positions, orientations, and movements of objects in physical or geometric space.
